page_metadata.biotools__summary: A database of gene-disease pathway association, along with tools to identify i) disease-disease comorbidity, ii) pathway enrichment, iii) disease enrichment, iv) disease enrichment using GO terms, v) polypharmacological target prediction and vi) Venn of genes, pathways, domains, GO terms, and custom list
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A database of gene-disease pathway association, along with tools to identify i) disease-disease comorbidity, ii) pathway enrichment, iii) disease enrichment, iv) disease enrichment using GO terms, v) polypharmacological target prediction and vi) Venn of genes, pathways, domains, GO terms, and custom list
